relatedness_reasoning: The inbound fraud report from customer_services triggers account freeze/block actions in the outbound message to accounts; both files share customer account concepts, fraud/compliance reasoning, and form a clear investigative pipeline where risk_and_compliance acts as intermediary.

mappings.reasoning: System-generated unique identifier for the outbound message; no source in inbound schema.
Outbound message timestamp likely derived from or close to the inbound report creation date.
Inbound targetDeployment is risk_and_compliance, which becomes the source of the outbound message.
Outbound destination (accounts) is not specified in inbound schema; determined by system routing logic.
Inbound reportType 'scam_fraud' triggers outbound messageType 'account_freeze_or_block' as a response action.
Inbound severity 'high' maps to outbound priority 'high' for urgent account action.
Inbound actionsTaken array includes 'account_frozen' which directly corresponds to outbound action 'freeze'.
Inbound accountNumber is masked format; outbound requires IBAN format, suggesting conversion/transformation.
Inbound customerName directly maps to outbound accountHolder; same semantic meaning, different field name.
Inbound accountType is 'current'; outbound is 'Current Account', a formatted/expanded version.
Both fields contain ISO 4217 currency code 'GBP' with identical meaning and format.
No branch location information exists in inbound schema; likely sourced from account master data.
Freeze scope ('full') is not specified in inbound; determined by compliance policy or system logic.
Inbound reportType 'scam_fraud' justifies outbound reason 'suspected_fraud'.
Inbound fraudDescription provides the narrative explanation used in outbound freeze description.
Inbound reportedByName (staff member) likely initiates the freeze action in outbound.
Department 'Fraud Investigation Unit' is not specified in inbound; determined by organizational structure.
Freeze effective date likely based on or near incident detection date, though may be adjusted by policy.
Specific transaction restriction flags are not present in inbound; determined by freeze policy.
Specific transaction restriction flags are not present in inbound; determined by freeze policy.
Specific transaction restriction flags are not present in inbound; determined by freeze policy.
Specific transaction restriction flags are not present in inbound; determined by freeze policy.
Specific transaction restriction flags are not present in inbound; determined by freeze policy.
Escalation level is not specified in inbound; determined by approval workflow logic.
Inbound escalationRequired boolean directly maps to outbound requiresApproval with same semantic meaning.
Approval deadline is not specified in inbound; calculated by system based on policy.
Assigned compliance officer is not specified in inbound; determined by organizational assignment logic.
Inbound reportId serves as the case reference identifier for tracking the investigation.
Quantified risk score percentage is not present in inbound; calculated by risk assessment engine.
Inbound actionsTaken includes 'customer_contacted' which indicates whether notification was sent.
Regulatory reporting requirement is not specified in inbound; determined by compliance rules.
